name: The Biometric Auto-Doc
description: Open a medical pod holding a smuggled data-drive by simulating a flatline.

flaws.name: Inject Adrenaline
flaws.flavor_text: Trigger the stuck diagnostic loop of the adrenaline injector to surge the heart rate to 200 bpm.

flaws.name: Cut Power
flaws.flavor_text: Sever the main power grid. With the heart rate at 200 bpm, the glitching monitor reads the sudden shutdown as a flatline and triggers mechanical safety release.
